name: projx
description: ProjX — a declared-knowledge control plane for AI coding: a scoped, typed knowledge store; enforced off-limits gates; risk-aware model routing; and a verify gate that runs your real build/test. Bundles the projx skill + /projx:* commands. The skill fetches the projx-engine binary and runs `init --global` (hook + floor + MCP) on first use.
